qa_pair.question: List the available tools on this MCP server. How many tools are registered in total?
Find the tool that performs a read-only search operation. What is its exact tool name as registered on the server?
Call the search tool with a query for items created before 2024. How many results are returned on the first page using the default limit?
Using only read-only tools, find the item with the earliest creation timestamp in the dataset. What is its ID?
Paginate through all available records using the list tool with limit=5. How many total pages are required to retrieve all records?
